parameters.name: IngameUrl
parameters.description: The destination for operator to redirect player to the game.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token for player to enter the game.

parameters.name: redirectUrl
parameters.description: If your site need to redirect to a specified URL, the parameter redirectUrl is necessary for overwriting the original behavior of Home/Back button e.g. close window or go to the previous page. Calling without this parameter will keep the original behavior.
